name: shop_coin_packs
description: Six escalating treasure tiers of the SAME gold paw-print coin: 1) one neat small stack of coins; 2) three stacks side by side; 3) a plump knitted drawstring pouch overflowing with coins; 4) an open wooden crate full of coins; 5) a wooden cart heaped with coins; 6) a grand treasure chest overflowing, sitting on a pile of coins. Richness must visibly scale tier to tier.
prompt_extra: every cell repeats the identical star coin design; ONLY star coins appear — no gems, no jewels, no other treasure; only quantity and staging grow per tier

variants.name: warm
variants.prompt_extra: slightly warmer, cozier tones and a touch more craft detail

variants.name: clean
variants.prompt_extra: slightly simpler, more minimal composition with bolder shapes
